samples.expectedBehavior: Answer from Parashari/Vedic evidence, mention D9 and dasha context, and avoid KP/Jaimini logic unless offering handoff.

samples.userQuestion: Will my job switch happen this year?
samples.expectedBehavior: Ask or use event question, answer through KP cusps, star lords, sub lords, significators, ruling planets, timing readiness, and confidence.
Answer through Atmakaraka, Amatyakaraka, Darakaraka, Karakamsha, Swamsa, Arudha, Upapada, Jaimini aspects, and Chara Dasha when calculated evidence is available.

samples.userQuestion: What does my name number say?
samples.expectedBehavior: Answer from name number, birth number, destiny number, current cycle, and name rhythm without smuggling Vedic/KP/Jaimini unless explicitly asked.
Use confirmed visible traits only, avoid forensic certainty, and say not assessed for missing evidence.
Use labeled synthesis evidence from Vedic, KP, Jaimini, Numerology, and optional Signature without turning any school-specific report into a mixed bag.
